# wildrift-merged-champion-types

[![npm version](https://img.shields.io/npm/v/wildrift-merged-champion-types.svg)](https://www.npmjs.com/package/wildrift-merged-champion-types)
[![License: MIT](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow.svg)](https://opensource.org/licenses/MIT)

Type definitions for Wild Rift and League of Legends merged champion data. ✨

This package provides TypeScript interfaces for the data generated by [wildrift-merged-champion-data](https://github.com/ry2x/WildRift-Merged-Champion-Data).

## Installation 📦

```bash
npm install wildrift-merged-champion-types
# or
pnpm add wildrift-merged-champion-types
```
